name: termpage
description: A sleek, keyboard-driven terminal start page with shelf bookmarks, search shortcuts, and 21 themes.
content_security_policy: script-src 'self'; object-src 'none'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; connect-src 'self' https://geocoding-api.open-meteo.com https://api.open-meteo.com https://raw.githubusercontent.com https://www.google.com https://icons.duckduckgo.com https://icon.horse https://geticon.io https://favicon.im;
